overview: The Department of Finance and Banking at Daffodil International University (DIU) offers a comprehensive program designed to prepare students for successful careers in the financial sector with a particular focus on banking and related industries.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Player quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Minimum CGPA 2.50 in SSC/Equivalent exam out of 5 (or 2.5 out of 4). Minimum CGPA 2.50 in HSC/Equivalent exam out of 5 (or 2.5 out of 4). Students must have minimum  'A' grade in both Math and English.
labs: Advanced lab facilities for financial analytics and cutting-edge tech resources to enhance practical learning
facilities: Advanced lab facilities for financial analytics and cutting-edge tech resources to enhance practical learning
contact: +880 961 790 1212, admission@daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, www.daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, Daffodil Smart City, Birulia, Savar, Dhaka-1216
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
